raw_consumer_statement: I initiated a dispute with citi credit card because I used my credit card to purchase ( partial purchase, as I also paid cash ) three hurricane sliding doors. The vendor incorrectly installed two doors with the incorrect size doors. The vendor refuses to correct. I disputed this with citi and provided very clear details including pictures. Citi asked the hurricance door vendor to reply to my dispute and they never did. So I asked citi how they could deny my dispute given I had details and pictures to support my claim and the door vendor never replied to the dispute.
